news.t: Capital Rotation: A Breakdown of This Week's Top ETF Flows
Pacer ETFs Surpasses $25B Milestone in Assets Under Management
Pacer ETFs Celebrates Banner Year of Growth in 2022, Crosses $20B to Kickoff New Year

holdings.infoBox: GCOW is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are BHP Group stock at 2.78%, Rio Tinto Group at 2.59%, TotalEnergies SE at 2.32%, Philip Morris International at 2.26%, and Equinor ASA at 2.25%.

overview.description: The Pacer Global Cash Cows Dividend ETF (GCOW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Pacer Global Cash Cows Dividend index. The fund tracks an index of developed-market large-cap stocks, selected by free cash flow yield and dividend yield, and weighted by aggregate dividends. GCOW was launched on Feb 23, 2016 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Pacer Global Cash Cows Dividend Index
